title: Consiliency git-discipline protocol
description: Normative machine-readable form of the pipeline-owned git-discipline contract (DESIGN §11.1). Post-ingestion the pipeline/harness OWNS ref classes, write-footprint, and merge policy for governed repos; humans do not drive branching. This is the neutral definition Portal, agent-harness (phase-loop-runtime), and the headless pipeline (gp) all read so they agree on which refs are pipeline-owned and how self-heal may reconcile them. The falsifiable ref-class enumeration lives in the pipeline-ref-classes registry, which this protocol references by name.

ref_class_registry.description: loadRegistry('pipeline_ref_classes') enumerates the pipeline-owned ref families and the human default. Both runtimes (harness + gp) read it to agree on ownership.

default_branch_commit.description: Under branch governance the loop hard-refuses any commit on the default branch (phase-loop-runtime refuse_default_branch_commit; gp branchgov).

policy.description: The runtime's pipeline-write boundary fails (unauthorized_pipeline_write) on dirty writes outside the allowlist.

default.description: BRANCHGOV ratification carries merge_policy in {auto,required,never}; the pipeline working branch mergeback defaults to required review.

hook.description: Rides the existing start-of-iteration reconcile + advisory scan; detection is always safe (pure reporting).

scope.description: Self-heal may reconcile ONLY leased, pipeline-owned refs. It never touches human refs or unleased pipeline refs.

auto_fix.description: Auto-fix is limited to provably-safe idempotent cases (re-checkout/rebase the pipeline working branch; prune already-merged phase worktrees). Everything else surfaces as a blocker; no auto-delete, no auto-move of possibly-in-progress work.

default_severity.description: Autonomy-first: soft/warn by default, opt-in to block. Never escalates to human-required.

finding_human_required.description: Self-heal findings are surfaced as human_required=false blockers; the contract never sets human_required.

never_delete_human_refs.description: The NEVER-DELETE-HUMAN-REFS invariant: self-heal / reconcile MUST NOT delete any human-owned ref under any circumstance. Data loss dressed as tidiness is forbidden.

manifests_single_writer.description: Per-artifact manifests are immutable single-writer gate records; refresh state lives in a separate sidecar, never in the manifest.

index_pure_merge.description: The projections index is a pure function of the manifests (+ envelopes + sidecars) with no generated_at, so --check is deterministic and byte-identical across drivers.
